title: Rikdom Plugin Manifest
description: Rikdom plugin manifest v1 contract. Declares identity, API version, and entrypoints for a plugin. additionalProperties are rejected to keep the v1 surface explicit and auditable; new fields require a schema bump.

api_version.description: Rikdom plugin API contract version that this plugin targets.

plugin_types.description: List of plugin_type identifiers this plugin implements (e.g. 'source/input', 'output', 'state/storage', 'asset-type/catalog').

module.description: Python module name (relative to plugin directory) that exposes the plugin class.

class_name.description: Name of the plugin class in 'module' to instantiate.

command.description: Optional command vector for legacy subprocess-style plugins (e.g. import-statement).
